spec_match.rationale: Perfect spec-match under experimental status, providing capability detection for compute-pass immediate capabilities and detailing the precise WGSL syntax and JavaScript calls for compute-pass setImmediateData while running a correct uniform buffer fallback.

interactive.rationale: Very interactive, offering real-time parameter adjustments that dynamically redraw the computed waveform.

edge_cases.rationale: Flawlessly implements WebGPU detection and provides a complete Canvas 2D rendering fallback duplicating the compute logic.

references.rationale: Cites the correct ChromeStatus reference link in the parent index.html.

design_system.rationale: Maintains design system compliance and ensures button overrides define both background and color variables.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus reference link on concept page
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must cite the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link directly. Add the ChromeStatus entry link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5199437611794432) to the 'see also' section.
